name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes - Oct 2019
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"What’s New"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Access the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://status.maropost.com/","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Maropost Status Page"}]},{"text":" for up-to-date notifications of service interruptions and scheduled downtime. You can also proactively subscribe to get notifications in your inbox. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Improvements and Bug Fixes"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Users will now see a 120-character count while writing a pre-header for their campaign. If you want to see more, check out this "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/998-creating-sms-campaigns","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Help Center article"}]},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Users can now organize different items in folders such as SQL Queries and Campaign Tags."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The content overlay will now show the correct footer in campaign details/reports to ensure that users see the correct information."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Segmentation Improvements"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Previously, the Random filter combined the number of active and inactive users. Now, users will be able to use the Random filter to create a list displaying the final count of active contacts only. If you want to see more, check out this "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/918-segment-rules-in-legacy-segment-builder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Help Center article"}]},{"text":". "}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Using the new Timeframe filter under “Not Purchased” segment criteria, users can segment contacts who have or haven’t purchased specific products within a specific time frame. "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
